framework.name: OAuth intent-execution split is the core vulnerability
framework.description: OAuth 2.0 assumes client = user intent proxy. In agentic settings, LLM reasoning creates a separation between intent generation and action execution that bearer tokens cannot distinguish. This is the exact 'constrained envelope' gap — current envelopes don't bind to intent, only to identity.
framework.raw_quote: existing API authorization standards do not provide any mechanism for cryptographically distinguishing between execution and intent and rightly so because they were never designed for this purpose

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
